steps.title: Transfect iPSCs with PiggyBac plasmids using Lipofectamine Stem Transfection Reagent
steps.instruction: Transfect iPSCs with PiggyBac plasmids using Lipofectamine Stem Transfection Reagent.

steps.title: Dissociate iPSCs and seed at 104,000...
steps.instruction: Dissociate iPSCs and seed at 104,000 cells/cm² onto Geltrex™-coated plates in StemFlex™ media supplemented with 10 µM Y27632 and 5 µg/mL doxycycline.

steps.title: Transition media to Neurobasal N2B27 with specific supplements
steps.instruction: Transition media to Neurobasal N2B27 with specific supplements.

steps.title: On day 1, replace media with...
steps.instruction: On day 1, replace media with Neurobasal N2B27 containing 10 µM SB431542, 100 nM LDN193189, 5 µg/mL doxycycline, and 5 µg/mL puromycin.

steps.title: From days 3 to 6, change...
steps.instruction: From days 3 to 6, change media daily with Neurobasal N2B27 supplemented with 1 µg/mL puromycin and 5 µg/mL doxycycline.

steps.title: On day 6, treat cells with...
steps.instruction: On day 6, treat cells with Ara-C and harvest for co-culture.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 µM Ara-C to the culture for 24 hours.

steps.title: Use Accutase to dissociate cells and collect for co-culture
steps.instruction: Use Accutase to dissociate cells and collect for co-culture.
